steps.title: Find the linear scale factor
steps.content:
Surface areas of similar solids scale by the square of the linear scale factor:
$$k^2=\frac{648}{72}=9$$
$$k=3$$

steps.title: Scale the volume down
steps.content:
Volumes scale by the cube of the linear scale factor:
$$k^3=3^3=27$$
Since prism $N$ has volume $1{,}350$, prism $M$ has volume
$$\frac{1{,}350}{27}=50$$

steps.title: Add the two volumes
steps.content: The sum of the volumes is $$50+1{,}350=1{,}400$$ The answer is 1400.
